column1: DUPLICATION POLICY: Datasets used in more than one domain appear in multiple rows — intentional. Each domain folder should be self-contained. All copies of a duplicated file must use the same vintage. For full analytic specs see CB3_Equity_Report_Analytic_Plan_v9.md. Priority rule: NYC OpenData > Other sources of same vintage. Furman/Pratt figures used only for CB3-validated headline statistics.
